LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BROTHERHOOD OF TEAMSTERS LOCAL 85'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF CAUSES OF ACTION, AGAINST PLAINTIFF - MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 6 AND 7 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF CANNOT PROVE NIKO ACTED AS AGENT FOR DEFENDANT'S BENEFIT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO 4 AND 5 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT WAS AWARE OF VIOLENCE OR THREATS OF VIOLENCE IN AND AROUND ITS HIRING HALL TO SUPPORT A DUTY TO PLAINTIFF. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
